questions.question: Across MM1, Idefics2, Molmo, Cambrian-1, and Prismatic's ablations, which knobs actually move VLM benchmark scores?
options: Image encoder, data mixture, and resolution schedule explain most of the variance — connector choice barely matters at a fixed token count
questions.explanation: Most of the gap between "good" and SOTA open VLMs is not architecture — knowing which knob to turn first when underperforming saves a multi-million-GPU-hour mistake.

questions.question: What are the five axes of the VLM design space Idefics2 named?
options: Image encoder, connector, language model, training data mix, and resolution schedule
questions.explanation: Every production VLM commits on each axis. The ablation consensus: axes 1 (encoder), 4 (data), and 5 (resolution) dominate; axis 2 (connector) is nearly a wash.

questions.question: What did the encoder comparisons consistently show?
options: SigLIP beats CLIP by 3+ MMMU points (MM1); DINOv2 and SigLIP top vision-centric leaderboards with CLIP mid-pack — the 2026 default is SigLIP 2 SO400m, sometimes concatenated with DINOv2 features
questions.explanation: Cambrian-1's 20+ encoder match-up made it concrete: CLIP-to-DINOv2 is worth ~5-7 CV-Bench points, while swapping connectors at equal tokens moves under 1 point.

questions.question: If connector architecture is a wash, what about visual TOKEN COUNT?
options: It matters a lot: 64 tokens is too few for OCR, 576-1024 is the sweet spot, 2048+ only helps documents/charts — Q-Former vs MLP is really a cost question about how many tokens reach the LLM
Token count only affects training, not inference
questions.explanation: At fixed token budget, MLP ≈ Q-Former ≈ Perceiver within a point. The real trade: Q-Former caps tokens regardless of resolution (saves context on high-res), MLP emits all patches.

questions.question: Why does LLM size "set the ceiling" for a VLM?
options: Bigger LLMs have bigger context windows only

Multimodal reasoning ceiling = the LLM's text reasoning ceiling; the encoder feeds it but cannot reason for it — 7B→13B reliably adds 2-4 MMMU points, and no connector cleverness substitutes for a 70B brain
It doesn't — vision quality is everything
questions.explanation: Why Qwen2.5-VL-72B-class models crush MMMU-Pro: the language brain is huge. Also from the ablations: detailed human captions (Molmo's PixMo) beat GPT-4V-distilled synthetic data at the same token count.
